post.description: Authenticate user and receive JWT token
Register a new user account. Only Healthcare Staff or Guest roles can be registered. Admin accounts cannot be created via this endpoint and must be created by system administrators.

400.description: Invalid registration data (e.g., email already exists, invalid role)

get.description: Get authenticated user profile information

post.description: Update own profile/password. All authenticated users can update their own profile.
Admin only - Create a new user account

403.description: Forbidden - Admin access required

get.description: Admin only - Get list of all users with optional search and pagination. Search applies to all records in backend.

parameters.description: Search by name or email (searches all records)

get.description: Admin only - Get detailed user information

delete.description: Admin only - Delete a user account

get.description: Admin only - Get system activity logs with optional filters and pagination. Search applies to all records in backend.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by description, user name, or type (searches all records)

post.description: Admin only - Create a new health program

403.description: Forbidden - Admin access required

get.description: Get all programs with optional filters. Guest users can only view active (public) programs without patient data.

200.description: List of programs retrieved successfully. Guest users receive programs without patient enrollment data.

get.description: Get detailed program information. Guest users can only view active programs without patient enrollment data.

200.description: Program found. Guest users receive program without patient data.

404.description: Program not found or not accessible (Guest users can only access active programs)

post.description: Create a new patient record (Admin and Healthcare Staff only)

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot create patients

get.description: Get all patients with optional filters. Admin sees all; Healthcare Staff sees only assigned patients.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, ID, email, or phone

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort by progress or adherence rate

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot view patient data

get.description: Get detailed patient information. Admin sees all; Healthcare Staff sees only assigned patients.

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot view patient data or patient not assigned to staff

patch.description: Update patient information. Admin can update all; Healthcare Staff can only update assigned patients.

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot update patients or patient not assigned to staff

get.description: Get patient statistics and progress. Admin sees all; Healthcare Staff sees only assigned patients.

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot view patient statistics or patient not assigned to staff

post.description: Enroll a patient in a health program. Admin can assign staff; Healthcare Staff can enroll but cannot assign staff.

400.description: Patient already enrolled in this program

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot enroll patients

delete.description: Admin only - Remove a patient from a health program

403.description: Forbidden - Only admins can remove patients from programs

patch.description: Mark a patient's program as completed. Admin can mark any program; Healthcare Staff can only mark programs for assigned patients.

403.description: Forbidden - Healthcare Staff can only mark programs for assigned patients

get.description: Get list of patients who have missed sessions. Flags patients based on expected vs actual attendance.

200.description: Patients with missed sessions retrieved successfully

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot view patient data

get.description: Get detailed information about missed sessions for a specific patient
get.summary: Get missed sessions for a patient

get.description: Get all notifications for the current user
Get count of unread notifications for the current user

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read
Mark all notifications as read for the current user

403.description: Forbidden - Admin access required

Get detailed medication information

403.description: Forbidden - Guest users cannot record dispensations

info.title: HealthTrack API
info.description: Comprehensive API documentation for Health Program & Medicine Tracker System

tags.name: Dispensations
tags.description: Medication dispensation tracking with duplicate prevention

role.description: User role (optional - backend determines role from user account)

password.description: Password (minimum 8 characters; must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number)

role.description: User role - Only Healthcare Staff or Guest allowed. Admin accounts cannot be created via registration. Defaults to Healthcare Staff if not provided.

password.description: New password (minimum 8 characters; must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number). Requires currentPassword to also be provided.

currentPassword.description: Current password — required when changing the password

password.description: Password (minimum 8 characters; must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number)

role.description: Role of the user. Admin can create any role, but typically Healthcare Staff or Guest.

programIds.description: Array of program UUIDs to assign this user to (for Healthcare Staff role)

password.description: Password (minimum 8 characters; must include uppercase, lowercase, and a number)

role.description: Role of the user. Admin can create any role, but typically Healthcare Staff or Guest.

programIds.description: Array of program UUIDs to assign this user to (for Healthcare Staff role). This will replace existing program assignments.

description.example: One-on-one therapy session with licensed therapist
Comprehensive mental health support program for patients

components.description: Array of program components (sessions, consultations, group discussions)

medicationIds.description: Array of medication UUIDs to assign to this program

staffIds.description: Array of staff member UUIDs to assign to this program

description.example: Comprehensive mental health support program for patients

sessionFreq.description: Session frequency override for the program

medicationIds.description: Array of medication UUIDs to assign to this program

staffIds.description: Array of healthcare staff UUIDs to assign to this program

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

medicalNotes.example: Allergic to penicillin. History of hypertension.
medicalNotes.description: Medical notes and important information about the patient

patientId.description: UUID of the patient to enroll

programId.description: UUID of the program to enroll the patient in

assignedStaffId.description: UUID of the healthcare staff member to assign to this patient enrollment

enrollmentDate.description: Date of enrollment in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to current date if not provided.

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in YYYY-MM-DD format

medicalNotes.example: Allergic to penicillin. History of hypertension.
medicalNotes.description: Medical notes and important information about the patient

programIds.description: Array of program UUIDs to assign this medication to

programType.description: Filter programs by type when assigning medication. If provided, only programs of this type will be available for assignment.

programIds.description: Array of program UUIDs to assign this medication to

programType.description: Filter programs by type when assigning medication. If provided, only programs of this type will be available for assignment.

patientId.description: UUID of the patient receiving the medication

medicationId.description: UUID of the medication being dispensed

programId.description: UUID of the program this dispensation is part of

dispensedAt.description: ISO 8601 date-time string of when the medication was dispensed

notes.example: Patient advised to take with food

checkInTime.description: ISO 8601 date-time string of patient check-in time

programId.description: UUID of the program for this attendance session

attendanceDate.description: Date of the attendance session in YYYY-MM-DD format

attendances.description: Array of patient attendance records for this session

notes.description: Optional notes about the attendance record
